text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh no! I'm gonna be late!
choice_data_list: Well, this is certainly a rare sight.
Well, this is certainly a rare sight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good morning! You see, the newest volume
took a totally unexpected turn—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I was reading a book last night... and
suddenly it was morning... Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oops... Time to go stretch my facial muscles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan yawns again as she makes her way
through the school gates, her exhaustion plain to
see.
